5.0.short_description: Activate the creation of ball result states in memory or as files

keywords.name: ball.result.activate
keywords.description: Activate the creation of ball result states in memory or as files

keywords.name: ball.result.addattribute
keywords.description: Add the ball attribute <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: ball.result.cycles
keywords.description: Specify the number of cycles between ball result tabulation or, if given with the load / export keywords, specify the exact cycle number of the ball result state to re-create/output

keywords.name: ball.result.deactivate
keywords.description: Deactivate the creation of additional ball result states or files

keywords.name: ball.result.generate
keywords.description: Generate a ball result corresponding to the current model state

keywords.name: ball.result.removeattribute
keywords.description: Remove the ball attribute <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: ball.result.zero
keywords.description: The ball result times will begin with 0 versus the current mechanical age of the system
